result.reason: RDP sessions are failing after a certain number of connections, indicating a resource or session management issue that prevents further use without restarting the application.
result.approach: Investigate RDP ActiveX control lifecycle and disposal within RdpProtocol and ConnectionTab classes to identify and fix resource leaks or improper session cleanup.
